final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input ctrl,
    input en,
    input load,
    input [3:0] in,
    output reg [3:0] out
);reg [3:0] unused_count;

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
        unused_count <= 4'b0;
    end
    else if (load) begin
        unused_count <= in;
    end
    else if (en) begin
        if (ctrl) begin
            unused_count <= unused_count + 4'b1;
        end
        else begin
            unused_count <= unused_count - 4'b1;
        end
    end
end

assign out = unused_count;

endmodule
